scripts.start: concurrently "npm.cmd run server" "npm.cmd run client" "npm.cmd run admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm.cmd run server" "npm.cmd run client" "npm.cmd run admin"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../admin-client && npm install --include=dev && npm run build && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../admin-client && npm install
